message:
test(web): add tests for trending, report-store, profile-store (batch 3)

Trending algorithm (21 tests): score calculation, normalization,
freshness decay, category/limit/exclude filters, edge cases.

Report store (28 tests): CRUD, type guards, priority scoring,
SLA status, reason severity, author tier penalty, pagination.

Profile store (36 tests): reputation scoring, badge calculation,
CRUD, username uniqueness, privacy, stats recalculation, sorting.

bd-pi3y

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-kfuj","title":"Feature: CLI Premium Pack Subscriptions + Update Notifications","description":"## Background
Pro users subscribe to premium prompt packs and expect updates to flow into their CLI without manual downloads.

## Scope
- CLI pack commands: `jfp packs subscribe/list/update/changelog`.
- Local cache with signed manifest and version history.
- Update notifications on new pack releases; optional auto‑update.
- License metadata + entitlement checks (Pro-only).
- Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content).

## Deliverables
- Pack subscription API endpoints + entitlement checks.
- CLI flows for subscribe/update and changelog viewing.
- Local cache format + integrity verification.
- Upgrade messaging for free users.

## Test Requirements
### Unit Tests
- Manifest verification and cache integrity.
- Entitlement checks and error formatting.

### Integration Tests
- Subscribe -> update -> changelog with real API calls.
- Cache refresh on new pack release.

### E2E Tests
- Pro user subscribes -> pack content available in CLI.
- Free user attempt -> upgrade guidance.

## Success Criteria
- Pro users can keep packs up to date with minimal effort.
- Updates are secure and auditable.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:29.605565630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T17:59:13.538749684Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-wsye","title":"Docs: Clarify CLI Free vs Pro + Build Guidance","description":"## Background
Users reported that the jfp CLI does not compile and are confused about Free vs Pro gating.

## Scope
- Clarify Free vs Pro command gating in the main README.
- Add build guidance confirming no Pro account is required to compile.
- Update CLI premium integration doc with a gating summary.
- Improve bug report template for build failures.

## Completed Changes
- Updated README Free vs Pro section + build steps.
- Added gating summary to docs/cli-premium-integration.md.
- Added CLI build diagnostics section to .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md.

## Success Criteria
- OSS users can build the CLI without Pro.
- Pro-only commands are clearly communicated.
- Issue reports include build details.
